description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:lts-alpine Docker image and caches the node_modules/ directory. Define two jobs: build-commit and build-tag. In both jobs run the shell commands "yarn install" then "yarn run build", then publish the dist/ directory as an artifact named "$CI_PROJECT_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG-$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA" for the commit job and "$CI_PROJECT_NAME-$CI_COMMIT_TAG" for the tag job. The build-tag job should only run for tag pipelines (only: tags). No explicit stages are declared, so the jobs use the default stage.
